judgment.summary: Workday features high gross margins and strong earnings growth paired with a very attractive valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 2.47 beat the 2.32 estimate by 6.4%, with the next earnings date on 2026-05-21.
positives: PEG ratio 0.46 — highly attractive relative to growth.
Forward P/E 10.04x vs trailing 48.27x — significant valuation compression.
Free cash flow (TTM) $3.01B — provides strong liquidity.
negatives: Operating margin 12.0% — significant gap from gross margins.

news.paragraph: Workday is expanding its enterprise AI capabilities through the integration of the Sana Self-Service Agent into Microsoft 365 Copilot. Additionally, the company was named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Talent Acquisition suites. Traders should weigh these product advancements and industry recognitions against broader market concerns regarding a potential software sector slump.
